# Namibia Administrative Divisions

> Open dataset of Namibia's administrative hierarchy:
> 14 regions, 107 constituencys.
> CC-BY-4.0 licensed.

## Quick Reference

- Total regions: 14
- Total constituencys: 107
- Coordinates: included (all levels)
- Last updated: 2026-05-27
- License: CC-BY-4.0

## Aggregate Data Files

- [All regions (JSON)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/namibia-administrative-divisions/main/data/all-region.json)
- [All constituencys (JSON)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/namibia-administrative-divisions/main/data/all-constituency.json)
- [Flat array (NDJSON)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/namibia-administrative-divisions/main/data/all-flat.ndjson)
- [Hierarchy tree (JSON)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/namibia-administrative-divisions/main/data/hierarchy.json)
- [JSON Schema](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/namibia-administrative-divisions/main/data/schema.json)

## Browse by Region

- [Erongo](https://github.com/open-admin-data/namibia-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/erongo-na02/) — 7 constituencys
- [Hardap](https://github.com/open-admin-data/namibia-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/hardap-na03/) — 6 constituencys
- [Karas](https://github.com/open-admin-data/namibia-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/karas-na04/) — 6 constituencys
- [Kavango East](https://github.com/open-admin-data/namibia-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/kavango-east-na05/) — 6 constituencys
- [Kavango West](https://github.com/open-admin-data/namibia-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/kavango-west-na14/) — 3 constituencys
- [Khomas](https://github.com/open-admin-data/namibia-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/khomas-na06/) — 10 constituencys
- [Kunene](https://github.com/open-admin-data/namibia-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/kunene-na07/) — 6 constituencys
- [Ohangwena](https://github.com/open-admin-data/namibia-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/ohangwena-na08/) — 11 constituencys
- [Omaheke](https://github.com/open-admin-data/namibia-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/omaheke-na09/) — 7 constituencys
- [Omusati](https://github.com/open-admin-data/namibia-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/omusati-na10/) — 12 constituencys
- [Oshana](https://github.com/open-admin-data/namibia-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/oshana-na11/) — 10 constituencys
- [Oshikoto](https://github.com/open-admin-data/namibia-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/oshikoto-na12/) — 10 constituencys
- [Otjozondjupa](https://github.com/open-admin-data/namibia-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/otjozondjupa-na13/) — 7 constituencys
- [Zambezi](https://github.com/open-admin-data/namibia-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/zambezi-na01/) — 6 constituencys

## Per-Region Full Data

- [Erongo](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/namibia-administrative-divisions/main/docs/llms-full/erongo-na02.txt)
- [Hardap](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/namibia-administrative-divisions/main/docs/llms-full/hardap-na03.txt)
- [Karas](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/namibia-administrative-divisions/main/docs/llms-full/karas-na04.txt)
- [Kavango East](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/namibia-administrative-divisions/main/docs/llms-full/kavango-east-na05.txt)
- [Kavango West](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/namibia-administrative-divisions/main/docs/llms-full/kavango-west-na14.txt)
- [Khomas](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/namibia-administrative-divisions/main/docs/llms-full/khomas-na06.txt)
- [Kunene](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/namibia-administrative-divisions/main/docs/llms-full/kunene-na07.txt)
- [Ohangwena](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/namibia-administrative-divisions/main/docs/llms-full/ohangwena-na08.txt)
- [Omaheke](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/namibia-administrative-divisions/main/docs/llms-full/omaheke-na09.txt)
- [Omusati](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/namibia-administrative-divisions/main/docs/llms-full/omusati-na10.txt)
- [Oshana](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/namibia-administrative-divisions/main/docs/llms-full/oshana-na11.txt)
- [Oshikoto](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/namibia-administrative-divisions/main/docs/llms-full/oshikoto-na12.txt)
- [Otjozondjupa](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/namibia-administrative-divisions/main/docs/llms-full/otjozondjupa-na13.txt)
- [Zambezi](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/namibia-administrative-divisions/main/docs/llms-full/zambezi-na01.txt)

## Schema Fields

- id: Unique identifier
- level: 1 (region), 2 (constituency)
- name: Local and English names with URL slug
- code: Government codes
- parent: Reference to parent division
- ancestors: Full chain to root
- children_count: Count of children per level
- zip_codes: Postal codes (where available)
- geo: Geographic coordinates (lat/lon, WGS84, all levels)

## Citation

Namibia Administrative Divisions Dataset (CC-BY-4.0)
URL: https://github.com/open-admin-data/namibia-administrative-divisions
